name: autotel
description: Zero-boilerplate OpenTelemetry for JavaScript/TypeScript. Skills covering instrumentation review, span analysis, framework adoption, and authoring new adapters / instrumentations / exporters.

skills.name: review-otel-patterns
skills.summary: Audit a TypeScript/JavaScript codebase for OpenTelemetry anti-patterns and guide adoption of autotel across 13+ frameworks.

skills.name: analyze-traces
skills.summary: Read OTLP traces from a backend, local dump, or in-memory exporter to debug failures, latency, and cardinality issues.

skills.name: create-autotel-adapter
skills.summary: Author a new framework adapter package (e.g. autotel-elysia, autotel-fastify) following autotel conventions.

skills.name: create-autotel-instrumentation
skills.summary: Auto-instrument a third-party library (drizzle, mongoose, redis, …) with OTel-spec-compliant span attributes.

skills.name: create-autotel-exporter
skills.summary: Ship a new OTLP-compatible exporter for a vendor backend with retry, batch, and error handling baked in.

skills.name: build-audit-trails
skills.summary: Design and wire tamper-aware audit trails on top of OTel spans: policy, signing, denial logging, redaction, framework wiring.

skills.name: migrate-to-autotel
skills.summary: Migrate from raw @opentelemetry/sdk-node, Sentry tracer, Datadog APM, New Relic agent, or OpenTracing/OpenCensus to autotel without losing trace fidelity.

skills.name: tune-sampling
skills.summary: Choose head + tail sampling strategies for a service: error-keep, slow-keep, AI-aware sampling, cost vs cardinality tradeoffs.

skills.name: debug-missing-spans
skills.summary: Troubleshoot when expected spans don't reach the backend: sampling, ctx.waitUntil, exporter errors, init order, runtime detection.

skills.name: autotel-core
skills.summary: Choose between trace, span, request logger, and events. Setup and API selection.

skills.name: autotel-events
skills.summary: Emit and consume autotel events (subscribers, drains, audit, metrics).

skills.name: autotel-frameworks
skills.summary: Per-framework setup quick reference.

skills.name: autotel-instrumentation
skills.summary: Working with the autotel SDK init, processors, and tracer provider.

skills.name: autotel-request-logging
skills.summary: Request-scoped logger patterns with useLogger() and forks.

skills.name: autotel-structured-errors
skills.summary: createStructuredError, parseError, status / why / fix / link / internal fields.

skills.name: autotel-adapters
skills.summary: Shared toolkit primitives for framework adapters.

skills.name: autotel-cloudflare
skills.summary: Cloudflare Workers, Durable Objects, Workflows, bindings.

skills.name: autotel-edge
skills.summary: Vendor-agnostic edge runtime base — composition, defineConfig, subscribers.

skills.name: autotel-hono
skills.summary: Hono middleware integration.

skills.name: autotel-tanstack
skills.summary: TanStack Start integration.

skills.name: autotel-aws
skills.summary: AWS Lambda + API Gateway + SQS + EventBridge.

skills.name: autotel-drizzle
skills.summary: Drizzle ORM auto-instrumentation.

skills.name: autotel-mongoose
skills.summary: Mongoose auto-instrumentation.

skills.name: autotel-mcp
skills.summary: Model Context Protocol server instrumentation.

skills.name: autotel-mcp-instrumentation
skills.summary: Auto-instrument MCP servers and tool calls.

skills.name: autotel-sentry
skills.summary: Sentry exporter via OTLP.

skills.name: autotel-subscribers
skills.summary: Subscribe to autotel events for metrics, audit, AI cost.

skills.name: autotel-vitest
skills.summary: Span-aware vitest matchers (toContainSpan, withSpans).

skills.name: autotel-playwright
skills.summary: Browser → server trace propagation in Playwright tests.

skills.name: autotel-web
skills.summary: Browser-side tracing and TraceProvider component.

skills.name: autotel-terminal
skills.summary: CLI / terminal application instrumentation.

skills.name: autotel-cli
skills.summary: autotel CLI tool — local trace viewer, init bootstrap.

skills.name: autotel-devtools
skills.summary: Browser devtools panel for live span inspection.

skills.name: autotel-backends
skills.summary: Per-backend tuning: Honeycomb, Grafana, Datadog, Sentry, Axiom, HyperDX, New Relic.

skills.name: autotel-plugins
skills.summary: Plugin system — registering side effects, custom processors.
